title: cyathella
intro: Cyathella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Cyathella are attributed to its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Cyathella are said to include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Cyathella is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal remedies, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
intro_study: According to "BMC complementary and alternative medicine", cyathella (also known as Cyathea gigantea) benefits include its potential to treat multidrug-resistant infections due to its antibacterial properties, which may bring relief in future treatment options.
